name: Malformed Type Expressions
description: Test cases for type parsing error recovery

test_cases.name: missing_closing_bracket
test_cases.expected_suggestion: Add closing ']' to complete the parameterized type

test_cases.name: incomplete_type_assertion
test_cases.expected_suggestion: Add the target type after 'as' keyword

test_cases.name: invalid_parameterized_space
test_cases.expected_suggestion: Remove space after '[' in parameterized type

test_cases.name: missing_type_name
test_cases.expected_suggestion: Add a valid type name before the variable

test_cases.name: invalid_where_clause
test_cases.expected_suggestion: Use 'where Type: Constraint' syntax for type constraints

test_cases.name: deeply_nested_types
test_cases.expected_suggestion: Reduce type nesting to less than 20 levels
